post.content:
Design a Spreadsheet with the following methods.
It should handle formulas.

	Class Spreadsheet

	1) get
	2) put

	Have to support formulae (* , +)
	B1: "=A1+A2+5"
	B2: "=B1+A1"

Solved it with python to handle formulas and update the cells along with get.
I ran out of time to ensure that every put updated the formulas for each other cell that had the current cell in its formula. 

`
  def get(self,cell_location=None):
  def put(self,cell_location=None, formula=None):
`

I think you can maintain a tree like Data Structure, where each cell has children nodes. These children nodes are created when the parent cell is referred in any formula. So, anywhere in the spreadsheet if we update a value then you can perform either DFS or BFS to update all the concerned nodes.
Use Topological sort for formula evaluation?
